title: dendrocnide schlechteri
intro: Dendrocnide schlechteri, also known as the giant stinging tree, is a plant species native to Australia, specifically found in tropical rainforests. It contains a potent neurotoxin called denticulin, which has been used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments. The plant's medicinal properties have been found to have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, making it beneficial for treating wounds, skin conditions, and infections. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, tinctures, and salves, although its use is highly regulated and requires caution due to the presence of the neurotoxin.
